basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially announced the Project Scientist II (Technical Lead) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. ICSR/PR/Advt.131/2026. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Madras website. Candidates holding a Ph.D. in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with 2 years of experience, or an M.Tech with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience, can submit their online applications on or before 27 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D in Bioprocess Engineering or related field with 2 years experience, M.Tech with minimum 3 years experience
qualification.details: Ph.D in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with 2 years' experience, or M.Tech with minimum 3 years' experience. Expertise in Strain engineering using synthetic biology tools (including screening and library preparation of genetic parts); metabolic engineering including in-silico genome scale models. Hands-on experience with bioreactors or fermentation systems, analytics, or downstream processes. Strong understanding of bioprocess optimization. Familiarity with Design of Experiments (DOE) and statistical data analysis (desirable). Experience with process modeling and simulation (desirable). Excellent communication skills both written and oral; as demonstrated in Scientific writing including presentations, documentation, proposals and report generation. Ability to work, collaborate, and mentor junior researchers in cross-functional teams. Ability to think critically, demonstrate troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

selection_process: Online Application Shortlisting Test/Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Scientist II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Madras Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Madras Project Scientist II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Scientist II Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with 2 years' experience, or M.Tech with minimum 3 years' experience. Expertise in Strain engineering using synthetic biology tools (including screening and library preparation of genetic parts); metabolic engineering including in-silico genome scale models. Hands-on experience with bioreactors or fermentation systems, analytics, or downstream processes. Strong understanding of bioprocess optimization. Familiarity with Design of Experiments (DOE) and statistical data analysis (desirable). Experience with process modeling and simulation (desirable). Excellent communication skills both written and oral; as demonstrated in Scientific writing including presentations, documentation, proposals and report generation. Ability to work, collaborate, and mentor junior researchers in cross-functional teams. Ability to think critically, demonstrate troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Madras Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) position is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D in Bioprocess Engineering or a related field with 2 years of experience, or an M.Tech with a minimum of 3 years of experience to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) post in this recruitment drive by IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,10,833/- per month for the Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Madras Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q6. What are the key skills and expertise required for this role?
faq.answer: Key skills include expertise in strain engineering, metabolic engineering, bioreactor experience, bioprocess optimization, and strong communication and problem-solving abilities.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for this position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application, shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at IIT Madras for the Project Scientist – II (Technical Lead) role.
